workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Manage your workspace settings and preferences.
workspace.welcomeDesc: Display a custom welcome message to new members when they join your workspace. Personalize the onboarding experience with instructions, resources, or a greeting from your team.
workspace.deleteWorkspaceDesc: Permanently delete this workspace and all of its data. This action cannot be undone.
workspace.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace? All data, including issues, projects, and members, will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
